name: @tank/animejs-mastery
description: Anime.js v4 mastery: animate(), createTimeline(), onScroll(), createDraggable(), createLayout(), SVG morphTo/createDrawable/motionPath, splitText(), stagger(), spring, WAAPI, createScope(). Production recipes included. Triggers: anime.js, animejs, createTimeline, stagger, spring animation, SVG morphing, scroll animation, onScroll, splitText, draggable, FLIP animation, hero animation, page transition, scroll reveal, micro-interaction, WAAPI, keyframes, easing, motion path.
